changeSet.author: migration-team
changeSet.createView:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.rma_name, p.project_type, p.project_intervention_types, p.main_intervention_type, p.earliest_start_year, p.project_end_financial_year, p.start_outline_business_case_month, p.start_outline_business_case_year, p.complete_outline_business_case_month, p.complete_outline_business_case_year, p.award_contract_month, p.award_contract_year, p.start_construction_month, p.start_construction_year, p.ready_for_service_month, p.ready_for_service_year, p.could_start_early, p.earliest_with_gia_month, p.earliest_with_gia_year, p.project_risks_protected_against, p.main_risk, p.no_properties_at_flood_risk, p.properties_benefit_maintaining_assets, p.properties_benefit_50_percent_reduction, p.properties_benefit_less_50_percent_reduction, p.properties_benefit_individual_intervention, p.no_properties_at_coastal_erosion_risk, p.properties_benefit_maintaining_assets_coastal, p.properties_benefit_investment_coastal_erosion, p.percent_properties_20_percent_deprived, p.percent_properties_40_percent_deprived, p.current_flood_fluvial_risk, p.current_flood_surface_water_risk, p.current_coastal_erosion_risk, p.approach, p.urgency_reason, p.urgency_details, p.urgency_details_updated_at, p.confidence_homes_better_protected, p.confidence_homes_by_gateway_four, p.confidence_secured_partnership_funding, p.environmental_benefits, p.intertidal_habitat, p.hectares_of_intertidal_habitat_created_or_enhanced, p.woodland, p.hectares_of_woodland_habitat_created_or_enhanced, p.wet_woodland, p.hectares_of_wet_woodland_habitat_created_or_enhanced, p.wetland_or_wet_grassland, p.hectares_of_wetland_or_wet_grassland_created_or_enhanced, p.grassland, p.hectares_of_grassland_habitat_created_or_enhanced, p.heathland, p.hectares_of_heathland_created_or_enhanced, p.ponds_lakes, p.hectares_of_pond_or_lake_habitat_created_or_enhanced, p.arable_land, p.hectares_of_arable_land_lake_habitat_created_or_enhanced, p.comprehensive_restoration, p.kilometres_of_watercourse_enhanced_or_created_comprehensive, p.partial_restoration, p.kilometres_of_watercourse_enhanced_or_created_partial, p.create_habitat_watercourse, p.kilometres_of_watercourse_enhanced_or_created_single, p.natural_flood_risk_measures_included, p.nfm_selected_measures, p.nfm_land_use_change, p.nfm_landowner_consent, p.nfm_experience_level, p.nfm_project_readiness, p.wlc_estimated_whole_life_pv_costs, p.wlc_estimated_design_construction_costs, p.wlc_estimated_risk_contingency_costs, p.wlc_estimated_future_costs, p.wlc_estimated_whole_life_pv_benefits, p.wlc_estimated_property_damages_avoided, p.wlc_estimated_environmental_benefits, p.wlc_estimated_recreation_tourism_benefits, p.wlc_estimated_land_value_uplift_benefits, p.carbon_cost_build, p.carbon_cost_operation, p.carbon_cost_sequestered, p.carbon_cost_avoided, p.carbon_savings_net_economic_benefit, p.carbon_operational_cost_forecast, p.carbon_values_hexdigest, p.fcerm_gia, p.local_levy, p.internal_drainage_boards, p.public_contributions, p.private_contributions, p.other_ea_contributions, p.growth_funding, p.not_yet_identified, p.funding_sources_visited, p.asset_replacement_allowance, p.environment_statutory_funding, p.frequently_flooded_communities, p.other_additional_grant_in_aid, p.other_government_department, p.recovery, p.summer_economic_fund, p.stale_data_cleared, p.reference_number, p.version, p.slug, p.updated_at, p.created_at, p.benefit_area_file_name, p.benefit_area_file_size, p.benefit_area_content_type, p.benefit_area_file_s3_bucket, p.benefit_area_file_s3_key, p.benefit_area_file_updated_at, p.benefit_area_file_download_url, p.benefit_area_file_download_expiry, p.funding_calculator_file_name, p.funding_calculator_file_size, p.funding_calculator_content_type, p.funding_calculator_updated_at, p.is_legacy, p.is_revised, p.legacy_project_type_migration_completed,
s.state,
ap.area_id, ap.owner AS area_owner,
( SELECT COALESCE( json_agg(jsonb_build_object( 'measure_type', nfm.measure_type, 'area_hectares', nfm.area_hectares::text, 'storage_volume_m3', nfm.storage_volume_m3::text, 'length_km', nfm.length_km::text, 'width_m', nfm.width_m::text )), '[]'::json ) FROM pafs_core_nfm_measures nfm WHERE nfm.project_id = p.id ) AS nfm_measures_json,
( SELECT COALESCE( json_agg(jsonb_build_object( 'land_use_type', luc.land_use_type, 'area_before_hectares', luc.area_before_hectares::text, 'area_after_hectares', luc.area_after_hectares::text )), '[]'::json ) FROM pafs_core_nfm_land_use_changes luc WHERE luc.project_id = p.id ) AS land_use_json,
( SELECT COALESCE( json_agg(jsonb_build_object( 'id', fv.id::text, 'financial_year', fv.financial_year, 'fcerm_gia', fv.fcerm_gia::text, 'local_levy', fv.local_levy::text, 'internal_drainage_boards', fv.internal_drainage_boards::text, 'public_contributions', fv.public_contributions::text, 'private_contributions', fv.private_contributions::text, 'other_ea_contributions', fv.other_ea_contributions::text, 'not_yet_identified', fv.not_yet_identified::text, 'total', fv.total::text, 'asset_replacement_allowance', fv.asset_replacement_allowance::text, 'environment_statutory_funding', fv.environment_statutory_funding::text, 'frequently_flooded_communities', fv.frequently_flooded_communities::text, 'other_additional_grant_in_aid', fv.other_additional_grant_in_aid::text, 'other_government_department', fv.other_government_department::text, 'recovery', fv.recovery::text, 'summer_economic_fund', fv.summer_economic_fund::text )), '[]'::json ) FROM pafs_core_funding_values fv WHERE fv.project_id = p.id ) AS funding_values_json,
( SELECT COALESCE( json_agg(jsonb_build_object( 'funding_value_id', fc.funding_value_id::text, 'name', fc.name, 'contributor_type', fc.contributor_type, 'amount', fc.amount::text, 'secured', fc.secured, 'constrained', fc.constrained, 'created_at', fc.created_at, 'updated_at', fc.updated_at )), '[]'::json ) FROM pafs_core_funding_contributors fc WHERE fc.funding_value_id IN ( SELECT id FROM pafs_core_funding_values WHERE project_id = p.id ) ) AS contributors_json
FROM pafs_core_projects p LEFT JOIN pafs_core_states s ON s.project_id = p.id LEFT JOIN pafs_core_area_projects ap ON ap.project_id = p.id
